blocks.text: Certifications & Industry Standards

At Jinhao Xinyuan Group, quality and sustainability are not claims — they're verified. Our factories across Vietnam and China are independently audited and certified by global organizations such as FSC®, ISO, SMETA, GMI, G7®, and ISTA. These certifications ensure every packaging product meets strict environmental, safety, and performance standards.
• ISO 9001:2015 – Quality Management SystemCertified for the production of color boxes, color cartons, and flexo cartons, guaranteeing consistent quality and operational excellence.
ISO 9001:2015 – Quality Management SystemCertified for the production of color boxes, color cartons, and flexo cartons, guaranteeing consistent quality and operational excellence.
• FSC® Chain of Custody CertificationVerified for the printing and sale of FSC Mix and recycled paper-based packaging, supporting responsible forest management.
FSC® Chain of Custody CertificationVerified for the printing and sale of FSC Mix and recycled paper-based packaging, supporting responsible forest management.

• GMI Certification – Lithographic & Flexographic PrintingCertified in both Litho (Process Color & Spot Color) and Flexo (Direct Print Corrugate & Spot Color) methods, ensuring accurate brand color reproduction and high-quality printing standards.

GMI Certification – Lithographic & Flexographic PrintingCertified in both Litho (Process Color & Spot Color) and Flexo (Direct Print Corrugate & Spot Color) methods, ensuring accurate brand color reproduction and high-quality printing standards.
• G7® Master Facility Targeted QualificationRecognized for excellence in color management and printing consistency, meeting global industry benchmarks.
G7® Master Facility Targeted QualificationRecognized for excellence in color management and printing consistency, meeting global industry benchmarks.

• ISTA Certified Testing LaboratoryFully equipped and certified to perform comprehensive transit testing, including drop, vibration, compression, and environmental conditioning, ensuring packaging integrity during transportation.

ISTA Certified Testing LaboratoryFully equipped and certified to perform comprehensive transit testing, including drop, vibration, compression, and environmental conditioning, ensuring packaging integrity during transportation.
• ISTA Packaging Dynamics Professional (PDP) Certified StaffOur team includes ISTA-certified professionals with expertise in packaging design, testing, and performance optimization.
ISTA Packaging Dynamics Professional (PDP) Certified StaffOur team includes ISTA-certified professionals with expertise in packaging design, testing, and performance optimization.
These certifications demonstrate our commitment to delivering packaging that meets the highest standards of quality, sustainability, and performance for global brands.
Committed to Sustainable & Ethical Manufacturing
At Jinhao Xinyuan, sustainability isn’t an afterthought — it’s part of our design and production DNA.
